productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men White Shoes
description: Style NoteWear these casual mid- top shoes with premium quality leather to showcase the genuine spirit known throughout the world as Classic American Style -  comfortable and casual, but still perfectly put together. Product DetailsWhite mid top shoe with nubuck and synthetic overlays, reinforced overlay at the heel counter, central lace-ups and stitched detailingPadded tongue and innerOutsole adhered to the upper for durabilityTPU outsole with herringbone and cylindrical grooves Material and CareLeatherWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
